slides.headline: *4* CRAZY THINGS IN AI *TODAY*
slides.subtitle: The *4 stories* you don't want to miss.

art.bg_prompt: A dramatic photorealistic editorial hero shot: a glowing custom AI accelerator microchip held up between two fingers, sharp macro detail with intricate circuitry catching warm amber rim-light, and softly out of focus behind it a person's awestruck face lit by the chip's glow in a dark high-tech room. Cinematic, premium, high contrast, real human skin, not cartoon, not uncanny. Vertical 4:5 with the bottom third darker and uncluttered for a headline overlay.

slides.headline: *OPENAI* BUILT ITS OWN *AI CHIP*
slides.subtitle: Meet *Jalapeño* — designed with *Broadcom*.
slides.body: OpenAI says it designed its first chip from the ground up, purpose-built for the LLM workloads behind ChatGPT, Codex and the API. Owning the silicon is the new frontier in the *compute arms race* — the labs are done renting.

art.bg_prompt_fallback: A cinematic macro shot of a glowing custom AI accelerator chip on a dark circuit board, premium product render, no text.

slides.headline: *$200M* TO BUILD AI THAT DOES *AI R&D*
slides.subtitle: *a16z* leads *Mirendil's* seed round.
slides.body: Mirendil is training frontier models that are *expert at AI research itself* — then wrapping a product around them so anyone can do AI work. A $200M seed is a massive bet that the next breakthroughs come from *AI improving AI*.

art.bg_prompt: A cinematic editorial photograph of two focused AI researchers, a man and a woman, standing in a dark premium lab studying a large glowing holographic neural-network diagram that is visibly generating a second network from itself. Real natural human skin, dramatic volumetric lighting, shallow depth of field, subjects framed in the upper two thirds. Vertical 4:5 with the bottom third darker and uncluttered for a headline overlay.

slides.headline: *GOOGLE* SCRAMBLES TO CATCH *ANTHROPIC*
slides.subtitle: It's reorganizing an *AI-coding strike team*.
slides.body: Per The Information, Google is restructuring the newly launched team behind its AI coding tools to close the gap with *Anthropic's Claude*. Coding has quietly become the *front line* of the model wars.

art.bg_prompt: A dramatic cinematic editorial portrait of Dario Amodei (Anthropic CEO) and Sundar Pichai (Google CEO) facing each other in a tense, high-stakes face-off, split lighting — cool blue on one side, warm on the other — dark premium newsroom backdrop. Photorealistic, accurate likeness of both real men, serious expressions, framed from the chest up in the upper two thirds. Vertical 4:5 with the bottom third darker and uncluttered for a headline overlay.
art.bg_prompt_fallback: A cinematic shot of two glowing AI logos facing off across a dark arena, dramatic rim light, premium editorial, no text.

slides.headline: *KALSHI* EYES A *$40B* VALUATION
slides.subtitle: *Doubling* its last round, pulling ahead of *Polymarket*.
slides.body: Per the FT, Kalshi is raising at roughly *$40B* — nearly *2x* its $22B last round — widening its lead over rival *Polymarket*. Founders Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara are scaling real-money prediction markets fast, with a public debut eyed for *2027*.

art.bg_prompt: A cinematic editorial portrait of the two young Kalshi co-founders, Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, standing confidently in a sleek modern fintech office with subtle glowing market tickers in the background. Photorealistic, accurate likeness of both real people, natural human skin, premium magazine photography, framed from the chest up in the upper two thirds. Vertical 4:5 with the bottom third darker and uncluttered for a headline overlay.
art.bg_prompt_fallback: A cinematic close-up of glowing green and red market probability bars rising on a dark screen, premium editorial, no text.

slides.headline: THAT'S THE *AGENTIC DROP*
slides.body: *4 stories*, every day — the AI moves that actually matter.

art.bg_prompt: A cinematic dark editorial backdrop of a softly glowing abstract neural constellation fading into black, premium and minimal, lots of negative space in the center and bottom for text overlay. No text, no logos.
